meaning: n.pl.古罗马历中3月,5月,7月,10月的第15日,其余各月份的第13日
examples: I've used several IDEs in my career as a programmer.
The ides of March are upon us, when thoughts turn to spring training, daffodils, March Madness .
The Ides of March is based on the play Farragut North by Beau Willimon, who co-wrote its screenplay.
